overall.description: A first-person exploration tour through the Gryffindor common room and adjacent areas in Hogwarts Legacy game. The camera smoothly walks through the medieval stone and wood-paneled interior, showcasing tapestries, suits of armor, antique furniture, and ascending a spiral staircase to an upper balcony with stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room main hall with tapestries and fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the main common room observing the medieval decor, tapestries, and antique furniture

entered.detail: large oval tapestry with portrait of bearded figure in ornate gold frame hanging on stone wall
large stone fireplace with wooden mantel and decorative items
full suit of medieval plate armor standing on display
tall curved wooden cabinet with paneled doors
upholstered armchair with wooden frame on ornate rug

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the Gryffindor common room main hall, showcasing a spacious medieval interior with stone walls, wooden paneling, and tall gothic windows. The camera moves smoothly past a large portrait tapestry, suits of armor, and antique furniture arranged on ornate rugs, with warm natural light filtering through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor storage room with covered furniture

events.description: passes through wooden door into the Gryffindor Storage Room

agents.ego_description: entering the storage room and examining the covered furniture and golden lion statue

entered.detail: tall wooden grandfather clock with glass front and brass pendulum
circular stained glass window with star pattern in blue and gold
chairs and tables covered with white dust sheets tied with ropes
large golden statue of a lion sitting on red cushion
tall unstable stack of wooden chairs reaching toward ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimmer side room labeled Gryffindor Storage Room, featuring dust-covered furniture, a prominent golden lion statue, and a tall stack of wooden chairs. The space has a round stained glass window and antique storage cabinets, creating a cluttered but atmospheric storage area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main common room crossing toward spiral staircase

events.description: exits storage room and returns to main common room

agents.ego_description: crossing the main hall toward the spiral staircase entrance

entered.detail: stone archway leading to the spiral staircase
wooden desk with large antique globe on top

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main common room, the camera moves past the suit of armor and antique desk with a globe, heading toward a stone archway that marks the entrance to the spiral staircase. The warm lighting and red tapestries continue to dominate the medieval atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden spiral staircase with stone walls

events.description: begins ascending the wooden spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase, passing suits of armor on the landings

entered.detail: elegant wooden spiral staircase with carved banister and red carpet runner
stone balustrade overlooking the lower level
suit of armor standing on the stair landing

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the elegant wooden spiral staircase, winding upward through the stone tower. The staircase features a carved wooden banister and red carpet runner, with a suit of armor standing guard on the landing and views of the lower common room visible through the stone balustrade.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with stained glass windows and trophy displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony corridor examining the stained glass windows and house banners

entered.detail: tall stained glass window with intricate heraldic design in red and blue
red and gold house banners hanging on the stone wall
large golden trophy cup displayed on wooden pedestal
ornate iron chandelier with candle-style lights hanging from ceiling
series of landscape paintings in wooden frames on paneled wall

segments.scene_description: Reaching the upper level, the camera moves along a balcony corridor lined with large stained glass windows casting colored light onto the wooden floor. House banners, trophy displays, and landscape paintings adorn the walls, with an ornate iron chandelier hanging from the beamed ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper side lounge with balcony overlook to main hall

events.description: enters side lounge room through wooden lattice door
reaches balcony railing overlooking the main common room below

agents.ego_description: entering the side lounge and moving to the balcony to look down at the main hall below

entered.detail: wooden door with lattice design leading to side room
pink tufted sofa with decorative pillows
stone balcony railing providing view down to main common room
high angle view of the entire common room with furniture and fireplace below

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a cozy side lounge through a wooden lattice door, featuring pink upholstered sofas and antique dressers. Moving to the balcony railing, the view opens to a dramatic overlook of the main common room below, showing the full scale of the space with its tapestries, furniture, and chandeliers from above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the warm, medieval interiors of the Gryffindor common room that eventually ascends to a high balcony overlooking the entire space. It begins in the spacious main hall, gliding past ornate rugs and suits of armor before drifting into the dimmer, cluttered atmosphere of a storage room featuring a golden lion statue and stained glass. The camera then returns to the sunlit main area, passing an antique globe and a stone archway to begin a winding ascent up a wooden spiral staircase. As it reaches the upper level, the scene shifts to a balcony corridor where colored light from large stained glass windows illuminates house banners and trophy displays. Finally, the camera passes through a lattice door into a cozy lounge before moving to the railing to reveal a dramatic, wide-angle overlook of the common room below.
